growth_records.strain: MAGs (uncultivated; recovered from San Pedro Ocean Time-series surface seawater)
growth_records.medium: Unamended 0.6 um-filtered natural seawater (dissolved organic matter), virus-reduced by dilution
growth_records.cite: Long et al. Benchmarking microbial growth rate predictions from metagenomes. ISME J (2021). DOI:10.1038/s41396-020-00773-1. [PMC7852909]
growth_records.snippet: Oceanospirillales Saccharospirillaceae MAGs had the highest observed growth rates, of 3.17-5.99 per day.
growth_records.notes: Highest observed growth range 3.17-5.99 per day (this taxon was the fastest grower). Reported in per-day units; converted to per-h by /24: max 5.99/24=0.2496 h^-1 (recorded), min 3.17/24=0.1321 h^-1. Doubling time = ln2/mu = 0.693/0.2496 = 2.78 h at the max rate. Incubated at 17 C (May in situ 17.2 C; Sept incubated at 17 C, in situ 20.4 C). No substrate/product fluxes reported.
